name: agent_generated_grant_reviewer
description: Comprehensive grant evaluation system for HRSA, SAMHSA, and other federal health grant applications. Provides autonomous AI-driven evaluation with professional scoring, detailed comments, and complete reviewer worksheets following agency-specific standards and guidelines.
description_for_agent: Professional grant evaluation MCP server that processes PDF/Word grant applications and NOFOs, generates agency-compliant scores and comments (HRSA/SAMHSA), creates reviewer worksheets, validates completeness, and provides detailed feedback for funding decisions. Supports document analysis, criterion-based scoring, strength/weakness identification, and report generation.
